article_meta.title: War in UkraineKremlin says leaked U.S

reasoning: Some genuine author-prose bias was identified, but there is an attribution violation (quoted text flagged), multiple missed instances in author prose, and all bias type labels are nonstandard/wrong per the defined list.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged William Taylor’s direct quote as evidence of bias, violating the rule to avoid quoted/attributed language.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: One clear false positive (quoted text) and one somewhat questionable framing item; others are defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear loaded/biased author phrasing such as 'pressuring Kyiv to endorse a proposal' and 'Trump appeared to shoot that down.', and arguably 'added fuel to criticism...'.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed labels (Framing Bias, Selection Bias, Source Selection Bias, Labeling Bias) instead of the specified categories like Slant, Word Choice, Bias by Omission, etc.
